scripts.demo: turbo run build --filter=ovellum... && node packages/cli/dist/index.js build --cwd examples/simple-ts
scripts.demo:site: turbo run build --filter=ovellum... && node packages/cli/dist/index.js build --cwd examples/manual-site
scripts.build:website: turbo run build --filter=ovellum... && node packages/cli/dist/index.js build --cwd website && node scripts/website-postbuild.mjs
scripts.dev:website: turbo run build --filter=ovellum... && node packages/cli/dist/index.js dev --cwd website
scripts.watch:website: turbo run build --filter=ovellum... && node packages/cli/dist/index.js watch --cwd website
scripts.check:website: turbo run build --filter=ovellum... && node packages/cli/dist/index.js check --cwd website
